about.title: About
about.text: I turn complex ideas into clean interfaces and high-performance applications. I've learned that tech means nothing without a real understanding of the business. I work in French and English, remote or on-site.
about.skills_intro: Expert in Next.js, React Native & Flutter. Available for freelance projects. — I specialize in crafting high-performance digital solutions that combine exceptional design with technical excellence.
